calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-14-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Neiman Marcus.
Order waiving live testimony granted and signed in court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Galina P. Undorf as follows:
Damages $70,708.49
Prejudgment Interest $21,580.61
Attorney's Fees $8,050.00
Costs $426.00, for a total of $100,765.10
Judgment signed in open court.
